specific_question: How many customer service calls did the quality assurance team at MediConn Solutions review in Q3 2024?
answer: In Q3 2024, the MediConn Solutions' Quality Assurance(QA) team reviewed 1814 calls (5% of total phone call volume) to assess representative performance and adherence to protocols.
dr_question: According to an article published on TechTarget.com in 2024, excellent patient communication is critical for a successful customer service department. How can MediConn Solutions improve patient communication in order to reduce service calls into Q12025?
